brief: The US imposes new tariffs on over 80 nations over forced labor concerns, while the Middle East crisis deepens with Houthi threats and US strikes; India's 'Cockroach' protests spread as activist ends hunger strike.
news_summary: The Trump administration announced new tariffs on over 80 countries tied to forced labor, replacing a global 10% tariff, drawing Democratic criticism. The UN warns the Middle East crisis is 'getting out of control' as the US launches more strikes on Iran and Houthi attacks threaten global shipping.
papers_summary: No research papers were provided in the priority news feed.

en.brief: The US imposes new tariffs on over 80 nations over forced labor concerns, while the Middle East crisis deepens with Houthi threats and US strikes; India's 'Cockroach' protests spread as activist ends hunger strike.

The UN warns the Middle East crisis is 'getting out of control' as the US launches more strikes on Iran and Houthi attacks threaten global shipping.

zh.brief: 今日重點：曼德海峽緊張局勢加劇，胡塞武裝威脅紅海航運，全球貿易面臨新風險；美國對80多國加徵關稅，引發爭議；台灣收緊陸配參選資格，引發兩岸反應。
zh.news_summary: 曼德海峽局勢升溫，胡塞武裝威脅封鎖航道，加劇全球貿易不確定性。美國對80多國加徵關稅，民主黨批評其繞過國會。台灣修改陸配參選規定，要求除籍滿十年，陸委會稱正本清源，國台辦批打壓。

todays_image.caption: Just as a band's rhythm can mask discord, the ABC's takedown of drug-trade episodes and Labor's sidestep of gambling reform both drown out uncomfortable truths.
todays_image.title: Band
